name: Midazolam
description: Benzodiazepine ti n ṣiṣẹ kukuru pẹlu ibẹrẹ iyara. Ayanfẹ fun sedation ti ilana, RSI ṣaaju oogun, ati iṣakoso ijagba IM/IN. IM ati awọn ipa ọna intranasal pese anfani pataki ni awọn eto aaye.
indications: Isakoso ijagba (IM/IN nigbati IV ko si)
dose: Sesedation: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV titrated. Ilana: 1-5 mg IV titari lọra. IM: 0.2 mg / kg. NI: 0.2 mg / kg (max 10 mg). Ipo warapa IM: 10 mg IM (agbalagba).
contraindications: Amutimu ọti-lile nla pẹlu adehun ẹjẹ inu ọkan
warnings: Ibanujẹ atẹgun -- ṣe atẹle ọna atẹgun, ni oluranlowo iyipada (flumazenil) ti o ba wa.
Iyara IV abẹrẹ fa apnea - Titari laiyara.

pediatric.dose: Sesedation: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV. IM: 0.1-0.2 mg / kg. NI: 0.2-0.3 mg / kg. Imudani IM: 0.2 mg/kg (o pọju 10 mg).
pediatric.note: NI ipa ọna paapaa wulo ninu awọn ọmọde - yago fun iwọle IV.

obstetric.note: Rekọja placenta. Neonatal sedation ṣee ṣe. Lo iwọn lilo to munadoko ti o kere ju; bojuto neonate ti o ba ti wa nitosi ifijiṣẹ.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Procedural Sedation Guidelines
